_comment: Per-(backend, variant) minimum tok/s floors for the local-inference ablation gate. Floors are intentionally generous on first-pass CI to avoid false-fails on shared/cold runners; tighten over time as we collect baselines per runner class. Use `default` as the per-backend fallback when a variant-specific floor is not listed.

linux-x64-cpu._comment: Linux x86_64 CPU managed fork floor. Keep separate from generic cpu so desktop regressions do not hide behind mobile/CI baselines.

win32-x64-cpu._comment: Runtime process.platform key for Windows x86_64 CPU.

win32-x86_64-cpu._comment: Canonical-arch alias for Windows x86_64 CPU.

windows-x64-cpu._comment: Managed artifact key for Windows x86_64 CPU builds.

windows-x86_64-cpu._comment: Canonical-arch alias for managed Windows x86_64 CPU builds.

vulkan._comment: Vulkan thresholds depend heavily on the device — discrete dGPU vs Mali/Adreno mobile chips have orders-of-magnitude different floors. Floors here target a low-end discrete GPU baseline; tighten per-device when concrete runners come online. Mobile-class Adreno/Mali should be benched separately under android-vulkan and given their own threshold block once we have data.

android-arm64-cpu._comment: Physical Android arm64 CPU floor for the in-process/mobile libllama path. Kept separate from desktop cpu so mobile thermal and big.LITTLE behavior do not water down desktop regressions.

android-x86_64-cpu._comment: Cuttlefish/emulator Android x86_64 CPU floor. Diagnostic only until a model-staged APK completes the full chat smoke.

android-x64-cpu._comment: Node process.arch compatibility alias for android-x86_64-cpu.

android-arm64-vulkan._comment: Physical Android Vulkan floor for Adreno/Mali. Intentionally not inherited from desktop vulkan; tighten by GPU family once Adreno and Mali graph-dispatch reports exist.

android-x86_64-vulkan._comment: Android x86_64 Vulkan floor for real ChromeOS/ARCVM GPU silicon. Cuttlefish SwiftShader runs are diagnostic and should not be used as recordable evidence.

android-x64-vulkan._comment: Node process.arch compatibility alias for android-x86_64-vulkan.
